title: Bunnyberg's Scabbard
description: Standalone equipment attachment editor with profiles.
body:
**Install:**

-[Bunnyberg's PBR 3D Items](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pbr-items-bunnyberg)

-[Freecam](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pbr-items-bunnyberg)

Default hotkey is F7

Displays items on the player model. Completely configurable very similar to YDM's weapon master.

This mod lets you add items, tools, and anything on your player model.
